mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_item_features_daily ( feature_date, user_id, item_id, last_interaction_time, interaction_cnt_30d, complete_play_cnt_30d, favorite_flag_ever, dislike_flag_30d, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{featureDate}, #{userId}, #{itemId}, #{lastInteractionTime}, #{interactionDelta}, #{completeDelta}, #{favoriteFlagEver}, #{dislikeFlag30d}, NOW(), NOW() ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE last_interaction_time = CASE WHEN last_interaction_time IS NULL OR last_interaction_time < VALUES(last_interaction_time) THEN VALUES(last_interaction_time) ELSE last_interaction_time END, interaction_cnt_30d = interaction_cnt_30d + VALUES(interaction_cnt_30d), complete_play_cnt_30d = complete_play_cnt_30d + VALUES(complete_play_cnt_30d), favorite_flag_ever = GREATEST(favorite_flag_ever, VALUES(favorite_flag_ever)), dislike_flag_30d = GREATEST(dislike_flag_30d, VALUES(dislike_flag_30d)), updated_at = NOW()
